title: Pancake Mod
description: This mods simply adds Dutch Pancakes to the game!
body:
Ever wanted to eat Dutch Pancakes in Minecraft? Well with this mod you can!

![Cinematic Shot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d97e2b9f378596b816b608819d513b85b621b61.png)

## Usage
All the Recipes can be found on the Gallery tab. First you need to craft _Raw Pancakes_. Then you can bake those _Raw Pancakes_ in a Furnace, Smoker or on a Campfire, the Smoker and Campfire are twice as fast as the Furnace. Finally you can either roll the _Baked Pancakes_ and eat them right away or put toppings on them and then roll and then eat them. To roll any _Baked Pancake_ simply hold it in your hand and press the **Use** key (by default: Right Click). To roll all the _Baked Pancakes_ that you're holding simply **Sneak** (by default: Left Shift) while pressing the **Use** key (by default: Right Click).

## Items in this mod
- Raw Pancake
- Baked Pancake
- Rolled Pancake
- Baked Pancake with Sugar
- Rolled Pancake with Sugar
- Baked Pancake with Honey
- Rolled Pancake with Honey
- Baked Pancake with Chocolate
- Rolled Pancake with Chocolate
- Baked Pancake with Apple
- Rolled Pancake with Apple
- Baked Pancake with Bacon
- Rolled Pancake with Bacon
- Golden Baked Pancake
- Golden Rolled Pancake
